titleStmt.title: SII 17.685: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 685. (A.R. No. 629 of 1904.) NĀGALĀPURAM, TIRUVALLUR TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the outer prākāra of the Vēdanārāyaṇasvāmin temple.

The inscription is dated Śaka 1445, Chitrabhānu, Makara, śu. 3, Friday, Śadaiyam corresponding to 1524 A.D., January 8, ·94, f.d.n. ·16. The cyclic year was Subhānu, not Chitrabhānu (See Nos. 683 and 684 above).

It records the royal grant of Nāgalādēvīyammanpuram as tax-free tirunāmattukkāṇi to Kariyamāṇikkatt-emberumāṉ for worship and offerings, in appreciation of the services rendered to the temple by the local people including Aṉaittaḻagum kaṇḍa Deyvaṅgaḷ Perumāḷ Mudaliyār.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . makāmaṇṭalecuraṉ rājātirāja parameśvara gaśapati taḷa vipāṭa gajapati saptāṅkaharaṇa tulukkataḷavipāṭa curattiṟāṇa rācciya śrī virakṛṣṇa teva makārāyar pṛtivirājyam paṇṇiyaruḷāniṉṟa [ cakāttam 1000 4 100 4 10 5] mel cellā niṉṟa cittiṟapāṉu saṅvatsarattu makaranāyaṟṟup pūrvapakṣattutṛtiyaiyum cukkiṟa vāramum peṟṟa cataiya nakṣatṛttu nāḷ jayakoṇṭa coḻa maṇṭalamāṉa toṇṭai maṇṭalattu cantirakiri rājyattu vetakiri decattu ppaṟṟil kuṉṟa vattaṉak koṭṭattu rattuppa vatu mutalāṉa Uḷḷiṭṭārkkum
kopinātaruḷḷiṭṭārukkum vāṉavarāyar koṉeriyāruḷḷiṭṭārukkum vetakiri Uḷḷiṭṭārukkum piccar kāḷattinātar Uḷḷiṭṭārukkum Ivvaṉaivaṟkum Immaṇṭalattu Ikkoṭṭattu nākalāteviyammaṉpurattu kariyamāṇikkattemperumāṉ stāṉam tirukkaravintapuramāṉa tiruveṅkaṭamuṭaiya mutaliyār putrar Aṉaittaḻa kuṅkaṇṭa mutaliyār teyvaṅkaḷ perumāḷ mutaliyār nākalāteviyamammaṉ purattait tiruppatiyākak kaṭṭaḷai
Eṅkaḷupaiyamāka nivantam paṇṇaveṇṭi tirukkoyil taṭṭu ttukkum kuṟaivāci tīpaṅkaḷ koṇṭu tiruvi ttukku puṇṇiyamāka kiruṣṇarāyapuram periyāṇṭa taṅkaḷ kaiyile nāṅkaḷ kaṇkāṇiyākak koṇṭum Ippaṭiyāle nāṅkaḷ kaiṅkariyam paṇṇi varukaiyil cuvāmikṛṣṇadeva mahārāyar gajapati rājyattiṉ perile poṭṭaṉūr vāka jayastampam poṭṭu Eḻuntaruḷi kiṟa ṉār vaṭamalaiyaṇṇa cervai paṇṇi paṇṇaveṇu meṉṟu tevar tiruvuḷḷam paṟṟi tevaiyillai tevarirkku
paṇṇittantom perumāḷ kariyamāṇikkap perumāḷ gajapatiyaiyum jayittu gajapati kumāraṉaḷavāka kaippiṭiyākap piṭittukkoṇṭu poṭṭaṉūrile yile jayastampam poṭṭut tirumpi Arikaṇṭapurattaiyum ṉāṅkaḷ kaṭṭiṉa koyilaiyum pārttu Itu vukku kamāka leyinta sa
p poliyūṭṭā yyap perumāḷ koyil tiruppaṇikku Iraṇṭilakṣam poṉṉum Ippotu yum ceṉṟa poṉṉellāṅka Upaiyam kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭu Eḻu kopuramum tirumatiḷ paṭiyum kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭu vile nāṅkaḷ paṇṇiṉa tirukkopuraṅkaḷ maṇṭapaṅkaḷ tirumatiḷ ka
mmamāka paṇṇinattaiyum kaṇṭu Irāyarum mikutiyāka santoṣittu yivvūrai tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka Emperumāṉ kaṭṭaḷaikkum tāṉamutalāṉa tiruṉāmakkāṇiyāka tirutterkaḷoṭumpaṭiyum kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭut tirutterttiruṉāḷukkum tevar ku tīrttam Eḻuntaruḷukiṟa peru māḷt tiruppāṭi veṭṭaitirunāḷukkum Emperumāṉ
mutalāṉa tirukkaṭṭaṭaḷaikaḷukkum maṟṟum tiruppaṇi mutalāṉa tiruk koyilukkum vaikaḷukkum maṟṟumuṇṭāna Ilakkai ttukkum cuṟṟu cīrmaiyil ṭaippiṟ cuṅkamum tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāka kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭa maiyil Ivvūrkku cuṟṟu cīrmaiyil ṭaippiṟ cuṅkamum tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāka kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭa maiyil Ivvūrkku tampa yarttu tiruppatiyākkit tiruṉāmakkāṇiyākak kaṭṭaḷaippaṭi niṉṟayattukkum Arikaṇṭapurameṉṟu perum mātāviṉperāle ṉākalādeviyammaṉpurameṉṟu kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭu Eṅkaḷukku ṉākalāteviyammaṉ puram māṉa Aṉaittukkerattuk kāṇiyum Eṅkaḷukku
ttukku mutal Aṭaippāka koṇṭapaṭikku Inta tamaiyaṉār yalammaṉ taṅkaḷai veṇṭi Inta Upaiyatti tam paṭaiviṭṭu rājyattukkuk karttar veka tipatiyāṉa tirumalaiṉāyakkar pe ṉ tampikku muṉṉiṭṭuk koṇṭu nākalāteviyammaṉpuram tirutti Ippaṭiye kaṭṭaḷai yiṭṭu vameṉkiṟa mata m pokāmal nakaramum veṟe pottakam nattattukkup paṇam
Utaiya kāṇiyum naṭakkaveṇṭi nākalāteviyammaṉpuram tiruṉāmattukkāṇiyāyirukkavum rāruṭai vantu pokaiyil Aṉaittuk kottukkum mānnyakārarkku māṉyamākavum niṉṟa Upaiyamākavum Uḻavukāṇi nilam meṟkaṭṭaḷaiyiṭukaiyil ttīra voḻukiṉpaṭi
tirukkuḷam tirukkopuramum ceṅkaḻu nīr Oṭaiyum parivāradevataiya māṇattukkum paṇṭārattil Aṭaipaṭṭa nilam taraiyāy niṉṟa nañcai paṟṟu ṟilam tāṅkaṟ paṟṟu timāṉyamum taṅkaḷ taṅkaḷukku niṟai ttukkai kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭa māṉyamum (tukkavāri) nattattu ga �ma devataiyaḷ mānnya mum mānnyamum
nākalātevi yiṟṟu ca ndādityavaraikkum kkut taṅkaḷ karaikku nilam nañcaip paṟṟu tāṅkaṟ paṟṟu kollaip paṟṟu taraiThe rest of the inscription is seriously dama.nīṅkalāka Eṅkaḷ tarai māṉyam � Ipa va nilam nañcaippaṟṟu vum meṟpaṭi
Digital edition of SII 17.685 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
